nodes.html: Our Story

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: Enabled Talent started with a simple realization: exceptional talent exists everywhere, but traditional hiring systems only look in familiar places.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Amandipp Singh

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: After a decade creating employment programs and working with organizations to improve their hiring practices, Amandipp saw the same challenge repeatedly.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: Qualified professionals with disabilities being overlooked because recruitment systems weren't designed to find them.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Why Enabled Talent Exists

nodes.html: Enabled Talent

nodes.html: AI-powered matching and personalized support

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.74

nodes.html: We're working toward a future where hiring systems recognize talent in all its forms, and where the best candidates get opportunities based on what they can contribute.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Our Team

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: Leadership

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 12.32

nodes.html: Amandipp SinghChief Executive Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 5.22

nodes.html: Chief Executive Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 7.12

nodes.html: Inclusive innovation leader with 12+ years building systems for accessibility, inclusion, and employment. Amandipp's lived experience and strategic vision drive our mission to unlock human potential at scale.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 12.32

nodes.html: Chitwan MallhiChief People Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 5.22

nodes.html: Chief People Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 7.12

nodes.html: 7+ years in banking operations with expertise in HR and inclusive workforce development. Chitwan ensures our platform creates meaningful pathways for both talent and employers.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 12.32

nodes.html: Swathi ShekarChief Operating Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 5.22

nodes.html: Chief Operating Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 7.12

nodes.html: 10+ years in education, research, and stakeholder alignment for social impact. Swathi transforms vision into sustainable operations that scale.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 12.32

nodes.html: Jeby JamesChief Technology Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 5.22

nodes.html: Chief Technology Officer

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 7.12

nodes.html: Tech architect behind scalable, AI-powered hiring systems. Previously at BReady and LilyHire, Jeby builds technology that puts human potential first.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Board of Directors

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: We are guided by a passionate board with deep experience in accessibility, technology, and inclusive workforce development. Our board ensures Enabled Talent stays accountable to our mission while scaling our impact responsibly.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: Our board members bring decades of combined experience in building accessible systems, scaling social ventures, and creating lasting change in how organizations think about talent.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Advisory Council

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: Our advisors are trusted experts who help shape our direction with insights from healthcare, HR, academia, and technology. They serve as thought partners and strategic guides, ensuring we build solutions that work for everyone.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.3

nodes.html: From former executives at leading tech companies to accessibility researchers at top universities, our advisors help us stay at the forefront of innovation while remaining grounded in real-world impact.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Join Our Mission

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Recognize True Potential

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 21

nodes.html: We're building solutions that help organizations recognize talent in all its forms. Where hiring decisions are based on capabilities and potential rather than assumptions.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 21

nodes.html: The future of work benefits everyone when we expand how we identify and develop talent.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Build Better Systems

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 21

nodes.html: This starts with creating better systems for connecting qualified professionals with opportunities. Building tools that help employers make more informed hiring decisions. Designing processes that work for everyone.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 15.66

nodes.html: Ready to be part of something transformative?

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 12.89

nodes.html: Whether you're a professional ready to showcase your talents, an employer seeking exceptional team members, or an advocate for change - your journey with us starts here.

Building Infrastructure
